description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named auto release that triggers on push events with tags matching 'v*.*.*' but not '*-rc*'. Run a job on a Windows 2019 environment with PowerShell as the shell, checking out the code, installing NSIS and checksum, and then performing a series of steps to build and release assets for both x64 and x86 architectures, including setting up MSVC, caching libraries, building assets, creating a Chocolatey package, and submitting it to Chocolatey and GitHub Releases.
